title: [The Feystone Inn, Tavern]
description: The rough-hewn wooden floor is strewn with stale rushes and bits of half-eaten food.  The air is thick with the smoke from cigars and pipes.  The tavern room is crowded with all manner of rough-looking elves, a few dark elves and dwarves mixed in for good measure.

wayto.26772: ;e table = "splintered"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
